goal: 修复 Mainline skill frontmatter 使 npx skills 可识别

summary.title: Quote Mainline skill description frontmatter
summary.what: Quoted the description field in skills/mainline/SKILL.md frontmatter.
summary.why: The previous unquoted description contained a colon followed by a space, which is invalid for a plain YAML scalar and caused the skills CLI to reject the SKILL.md as having no valid name/description, reporting No skills found even though the file existed in the cloned repo.
summary.user_goal: 非也，我已经合进 main 了，你再看看呢

decisions.chose: Wrap the long description in double quotes.
decisions.rationale: This preserves the trigger text while making the YAML frontmatter parseable by the skills CLI.
The remote main tree already contains the SKILL.md; the failure mode is parseability, not skill location or discovery depth.

rejected.alternative: Move the skill to another directory
rejected.reason: The skills CLI cloned a tree that already contained skills/mainline/SKILL.md, so location was not the cause.
Quoting keeps the broader trigger policy intact while fixing YAML syntax.

followups: After this fix lands on main, rerun npx skills add git@github.com:mainline-org/mainline.git --skill mainline -a codex --copy -y.
If future descriptions include YAML-sensitive characters, quote them or use a block scalar in frontmatter.

behavioral_changes: The Mainline skill frontmatter is parseable by the skills CLI.
npx skills can discover the mainline skill once this commit is available from the selected Git ref.
migration_notes: Existing installed copies are unaffected; users who failed to install should retry after the fix reaches their source ref.
